description: Corrective: Valve sticking at 61% open. Field investigation found corroded stem. Stem cleaned and polished, packing replaced, actuator bench set adjusted. Stroke time improved from 10.8s to 3.2s.
Annual CIP cleaning: Shell side circulated with 5% HCl solution for 4 hours at 60°C, followed by neutralization and passivation. Fouling factor improved from 0.0004 to 0.0001 m².K/kW.

Six-monthly valve inspection: 1st stage suction and discharge valves removed and inspected. Suction valve plate showing wear (1.9mm remaining vs 3mm new). Replaced both suction valve plates and springs. Discharge valves satisfactory.
Annual insulation test: Megger at 500V DC — Phase R: 4552 MΩ, Phase Y: 3445 MΩ, Phase B: 2236 MΩ. PI (Polarization Index): 2.7. All within acceptable limits (>100 MΩ corrected to 40°C, PI > 2.0).

Corrective: 6 tubes plugged after eddy current inspection revealed wall loss >40%. IRIS inspection on remaining tubes — 9 tubes show 20-30% wall loss (next inspection in 2 years). Tube bundle remaining life estimated at 7 years.
Annual overhaul: Impeller, wear rings, mechanical seal (John Crane Type 5610), and bearings (SKF 6320) replaced. Alignment set to 0.05mm/0.03mm. Performance test: head 138m, flow 28m³/hr.
Annual CIP cleaning: Shell side circulated with 5% HCl solution for 4 hours at 60°C, followed by neutralization and passivation. Fouling factor improved from 0.0003 to 0.0002 m².K/kW.

Monthly test run: DG started on auto — start time 6.6s (spec <10s). Loaded to 80% for 30 minutes. Parameters normal: voltage 416V, frequency 50.1Hz, oil pressure 4.7 bar, coolant temp 86°C. Fuel level: 65%.

Monthly test run: DG started on auto — start time 8.5s (spec <10s). Loaded to 52% for 30 minutes. Parameters normal: voltage 409V, frequency 49.7Hz, oil pressure 4.4 bar, coolant temp 75°C. Fuel level: 83%.
Corrective: Valve sticking at 38% open. Field investigation found corroded stem. Stem cleaned and polished, packing replaced, actuator bench set adjusted. Stroke time improved from 17.2s to 5.9s.
Annual insulation test: Megger at 500V DC — Phase R: 4592 MΩ, Phase Y: 4853 MΩ, Phase B: 575 MΩ. PI (Polarization Index): 6.0. All within acceptable limits (>100 MΩ corrected to 40°C, PI > 2.0).

Emergency: Pump tripped on high vibration (3.5 mm/s). Coupling guard removed — found coupling spider completely disintegrated. Coupling replaced (Rexnord Omega E40). Alignment checked and adjusted. Pump restarted after 19.3hrs.
Annual overhaul: Impeller, wear rings, mechanical seal (John Crane Type 5610), and bearings (SKF 7314) replaced. Alignment set to 0.05mm/0.03mm. Performance test: head 92m, flow 45m³/hr.
Quarterly PM: Vibration check (overall 9.3 mm/s), bearing temperature check (DE: 135°C), alignment verification, coupling inspection, seal face inspection. All readings within acceptable limits.
Corrective: High discharge air temperature (110°C vs alarm at 110°C). Found blocked oil cooler (external dust buildup). Cooler cleaned with compressed air. Temperature normalized to 61°C.

Annual overhaul: Piston rings, rider rings, and packing rings replaced on both stages. Cylinder bore measured — within tolerance (200.1mm vs nominal 200.0mm). Crosshead pin and bearing clearance checked — satisfactory.

Annual pop test: Valve removed and bench tested. Set pressure: 36.9 bar (nameplate: 33.0 bar). Reseat pressure: 24.7 bar. Valve reseated — set pressure adjusted to 33.0 bar ±3%. New gaskets installed. Tag sealed.

Emergency: Pump tripped on high vibration (5.3 mm/s). Coupling guard removed — found coupling spider completely disintegrated. Coupling replaced (Rexnord Omega E40). Alignment checked and adjusted. Pump restarted after 17.2hrs.

Emergency: Pump tripped on high vibration (3.4 mm/s). Coupling guard removed — found coupling spider completely disintegrated. Coupling replaced (Rexnord Omega E40). Alignment checked and adjusted. Pump restarted after 14.5hrs.
Annual insulation test: Megger at 500V DC — Phase R: 1249 MΩ, Phase Y: 4162 MΩ, Phase B: 4207 MΩ. PI (Polarization Index): 4.4. All within acceptable limits (>100 MΩ corrected to 40°C, PI > 2.0).
Corrective: Valve sticking at 61% open. Field investigation found corroded stem. Stem cleaned and polished, packing replaced, actuator bench set adjusted. Stroke time improved from 20.8s to 5.3s.
Quarterly greasing: DE bearing — 35g of Shell Gadus S2 V220. NDE bearing — 28g. Vibration before/after: DE 5.1/1.6 mm/s, NDE 2.4/1.5 mm/s. No abnormal noise.
Corrective: DE bearing replaced (SKF 6318). High vibration detected during routine round (8.2 mm/s overall, alarm at 7.1). Bearing showed inner race spalling. Vibration after replacement: 1.6 mm/s.
Quarterly greasing: DE bearing — 27g of Mobil Polyrex EM. NDE bearing — 24g. Vibration before/after: DE 4.1/2.6 mm/s, NDE 3.8/1.1 mm/s. No abnormal noise.
Annual CIP cleaning: Shell side circulated with 5% HCl solution for 4 hours at 60°C, followed by neutralization and passivation. Fouling factor improved from 0.0007 to 0.0002 m².K/kW.

Corrective: 5 tubes plugged after eddy current inspection revealed wall loss >40%. IRIS inspection on remaining tubes — 11 tubes show 20-30% wall loss (next inspection in 2 years). Tube bundle remaining life estimated at 6 years.

Emergency: Pump tripped on high vibration (4.1 mm/s). Coupling guard removed — found coupling spider completely disintegrated. Coupling replaced (Rexnord Omega E40). Alignment checked and adjusted. Pump restarted after 19.0hrs.

Predictive: Oil analysis showed high Fe content (95 ppm vs normal <50 ppm). Bearing inspection revealed early stage pitting on outer race. Bearing preemptively replaced (SKF 7314). Oil flushed and replaced.
Annual overhaul: Impeller, wear rings, mechanical seal (John Crane Type 5610), and bearings (SKF 6318) replaced. Alignment set to 0.05mm/0.03mm. Performance test: head 97m, flow 50m³/hr.
Annual CIP cleaning: Shell side circulated with 5% HCl solution for 4 hours at 60°C, followed by neutralization and passivation. Fouling factor improved from 0.0006 to 0.0001 m².K/kW.

Emergency: Pump tripped on high vibration (1.6 mm/s). Coupling guard removed — found coupling spider completely disintegrated. Coupling replaced (Rexnord Omega E40). Alignment checked and adjusted. Pump restarted after 13.2hrs.
Corrective: Mechanical seal replaced due to excessive leakage (~13 drops/min). Root cause: dry running during suction strainer cleaning. New seal installed (John Crane 5610). No shaft damage.
Quarterly PM: Vibration measurement on all bearing positions. DE axial: 6.1 mm/s, NDE radial: 4.9 mm/s. Coupling guard inspection, oil level check, seal leakage check — all satisfactory.
Corrective: High discharge air temperature (71°C vs alarm at 110°C). Found blocked oil cooler (external dust buildup). Cooler cleaned with compressed air. Temperature normalized to 65°C.
Corrective: High discharge air temperature (100°C vs alarm at 110°C). Found blocked oil cooler (external dust buildup). Cooler cleaned with compressed air. Temperature normalized to 79°C.
Annual overhaul: Impeller, wear rings, mechanical seal (John Crane Type 5610), and bearings (SKF 6320) replaced. Alignment set to 0.05mm/0.03mm. Performance test: head 87m, flow 17m³/hr.

Annual inspection: Bundle pulled for visual inspection. Light scaling on OD observed. Gaskets replaced (Klingersil C-4430). Shell flange faces inspected — no damage. Bolts re-torqued to 258 Nm using cross-pattern.

Corrective: 3 tubes plugged after eddy current inspection revealed wall loss >40%. IRIS inspection on remaining tubes — 14 tubes show 20-30% wall loss (next inspection in 2 years). Tube bundle remaining life estimated at 6 years.

Annual overhaul: Valve removed from line. Trim (plug, seat ring, cage) inspected — moderate erosion on seat ring. Seat lapped. Packing replaced (PTFE/graphite). Actuator diaphragm inspected — no cracks. Positioner calibrated: 4-20mA input, 3-15 psi output, linearity < 0.5%.

Annual IBR inspection preparation: Boiler cooled down, waterside opened for inspection. Tube thickness measurements taken at 24 CMLs — minimum remaining: 6.3mm (original: 9.1mm). Corrosion rate: 0.11 mm/yr. Next inspection due: 2026.
Quarterly PM: Vibration measurement on all bearing positions. DE axial: 1.6 mm/s, NDE radial: 1.9 mm/s. Coupling guard inspection, oil level check, seal leakage check — all satisfactory.

Emergency: Pump tripped on high vibration (8.6 mm/s). Coupling guard removed — found coupling spider completely disintegrated. Coupling replaced (Rexnord Omega E40). Alignment checked and adjusted. Pump restarted after 6.5hrs.
Quarterly greasing: DE bearing — 34g of SKF LGMT 2. NDE bearing — 29g. Vibration before/after: DE 4.1/1.7 mm/s, NDE 2.3/2.0 mm/s. No abnormal noise.

Six-monthly valve inspection: 1st stage suction and discharge valves removed and inspected. Suction valve plate showing wear (2.0mm remaining vs 3mm new). Replaced both suction valve plates and springs. Discharge valves satisfactory.
Corrective: DE bearing replaced (SKF 7314). High vibration detected during routine round (6.2 mm/s overall, alarm at 7.1). Bearing showed inner race spalling. Vibration after replacement: 2.5 mm/s.

Annual overhaul: Piston rings, rider rings, and packing rings replaced on both stages. Cylinder bore measured — within tolerance (200.0mm vs nominal 200.0mm). Crosshead pin and bearing clearance checked — satisfactory.
Corrective: 2nd stage discharge temperature high (146°C vs alarm at 155°C). Found stuck discharge valve (plate fragment lodged). Valve replaced. Intercooler checked — satisfactory.
Annual insulation test: Megger at 500V DC — Phase R: 1362 MΩ, Phase Y: 493 MΩ, Phase B: 2125 MΩ. PI (Polarization Index): 4.8. All within acceptable limits (>100 MΩ corrected to 40°C, PI > 2.0).

Quarterly PM: Vibration check (overall 2.7 mm/s), bearing temperature check (DE: 117°C), alignment verification, coupling inspection, seal face inspection. All readings within acceptable limits.

Emergency: Pump tripped on high vibration (8.1 mm/s). Coupling guard removed — found coupling spider completely disintegrated. Coupling replaced (Rexnord Omega E40). Alignment checked and adjusted. Pump restarted after 7.9hrs.

Annual insulation test: Megger at 500V DC — Phase R: 3795 MΩ, Phase Y: 3702 MΩ, Phase B: 3281 MΩ. PI (Polarization Index): 5.5. All within acceptable limits (>100 MΩ corrected to 40°C, PI > 2.0).
Corrective: Valve sticking at 69% open. Field investigation found corroded stem. Stem cleaned and polished, packing replaced, actuator bench set adjusted. Stroke time improved from 8.2s to 4.7s.

Quarterly PM: Vibration check (overall 8.2 mm/s), bearing temperature check (DE: 108°C), alignment verification, coupling inspection, seal face inspection. All readings within acceptable limits.
Annual CIP cleaning: Shell side circulated with 5% HCl solution for 4 hours at 60°C, followed by neutralization and passivation. Fouling factor improved from 0.0004 to 0.0001 m².K/kW.
Annual overhaul: Impeller, wear rings, mechanical seal (John Crane Type 5610), and bearings (SKF 6318) replaced. Alignment set to 0.05mm/0.03mm. Performance test: head 147m, flow 31m³/hr.

8000-hour service: Air/oil filter replaced, oil separator element replaced, minimum pressure valve checked. Oil (Atlas Copco Roto-Inject) replaced — 28 liters. Air end inlet valve inspected. Running hours: 22.7.

Annual pop test: Valve removed and bench tested. Set pressure: 23.3 bar (nameplate: 18.5 bar). Reseat pressure: 23.9 bar. Valve reseated — set pressure adjusted to 18.5 bar ±3%. New gaskets installed. Tag sealed.

Corrective: 5 tubes plugged after eddy current inspection revealed wall loss >40%. IRIS inspection on remaining tubes — 7 tubes show 20-30% wall loss (next inspection in 2 years). Tube bundle remaining life estimated at 5 years.
Corrective: DE bearing replaced (SKF 6318). High vibration detected during routine round (5.5 mm/s overall, alarm at 7.1). Bearing showed inner race spalling. Vibration after replacement: 2.1 mm/s.
Annual overhaul: Impeller, wear rings, mechanical seal (John Crane Type 5610), and bearings (SKF NU316) replaced. Alignment set to 0.05mm/0.03mm. Performance test: head 95m, flow 31m³/hr.
Quarterly PM: Vibration check (overall 9.1 mm/s), bearing temperature check (DE: 82°C), alignment verification, coupling inspection, seal face inspection. All readings within acceptable limits.

Annual overhaul: Valve removed from line. Trim (plug, seat ring, cage) inspected — moderate erosion on seat ring. Seat lapped. Packing replaced (PTFE/graphite). Actuator diaphragm inspected — no cracks. Positioner calibrated: 4-20mA input, 3-15 psi output, linearity < 0.5%.

Annual inspection: Bundle pulled for visual inspection. Light scaling on OD observed. Gaskets replaced (Klingersil C-4430). Shell flange faces inspected — no damage. Bolts re-torqued to 228 Nm using cross-pattern.
Corrective: Valve sticking at 34% open. Field investigation found corroded stem. Stem cleaned and polished, packing replaced, actuator bench set adjusted. Stroke time improved from 23.4s to 3.4s.
